things.name: Northern Lights
things.description: Aurora borealis viewing — September to March outside the city or on organized tours into the darkness

things.name: Golden Circle Day Trip
things.description: Iceland's classic 300-km loop: Geysir hot spring, Gullfoss waterfall and Thingvellir National Park

things.name: Blue Lagoon
things.description: Otherworldly geothermal spa in a lava field — milky blue 39°C waters, silica mud masks and sauna

things.name: Hallgrimskirkja Church
things.description: Reykjavik's volcanic lava column-inspired landmark church — tower elevator offers panoramic views

things.name: National Museum of Iceland
things.description: Viking Age to modern Iceland — from the famous 12th-century Valkyrie figure to 20th-century exhibits

things.name: Harpa Concert Hall
things.description: Stunning multi-coloured glass facade designed with Olafur Eliasson on the Reykjavik waterfront

things.name: Reykjavik Street Food & Laugavegur
things.description: The main shopping street packed with hot dog stands, fish and chips and the famous Baejarins Beztu pylsur

things.name: Whale Watching from Old Harbour
things.description: Year-round boat tours from Reykjavik's Old Harbour to spot minke whales, humpbacks and dolphins

things.name: South Coast Waterfalls Day Trip
things.description: Seljalandsfoss, Skogafoss, Reynisfjara black sand beach and the town of Vik — 180 km return

things.name: Perlan Museum
things.description: Futuristic dome museum with an indoor ice cave, planetarium and the best views of Reykjavik
